notes: Current main is v1.9.2. PRs #16 (fix empty remove) and #17 (getItems limit) merged. PR #14 (BEGINS_WITH/CONTAINS) rebased onto v1.9.2 on 2026-04-28 — clean rebase, no conflicts. New PR created: docs rewrite README (branch repo-assist/docs-update-readme-api). Task 2 had no user issues to comment on (all open issues are Repo Assist system issues). Issue #1: auth-failure, expires May 1. Future: consider cursor-based pagination (ExclusiveStartKey) for getItems.
